case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROP SUBJ DISP $6450.OO U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $6450.OO U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-19-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,450.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DANIEL PATINO. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner The People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
